prompt: A trading card frame template for a tower defense card game, dark fantasy style, portrait orientation. Empty card frame with NO TEXT and NO LETTERS anywhere. Ornate iron and steel border with battle-worn metal trim. Top section: rectangular nameplate slot (empty parchment banner). Center: large empty rectangular illustration window with subtle inner shadow. Bottom section: empty description panel made of aged parchment. Very bottom: two small circular gem slots for ATK and HP stats (red gem on left, green gem on right, both empty/decorative). Color palette: deep gunmetal gray, blood red accents, bronze trim. Centered composition, clean edges, transparent or solid dark background. NO TEXT, NO WRITING, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS.
